data.content: Centralized max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len rule exceptions for the d17b core-module file set in eslint.config.mjs and removed the scattered inline eslint-disable directives from those files. Also kept the existing small cleanup edits in src/lib/agent-history.ts, src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts, src/lib/backends/beads-jsonl-dto.ts, and src/stores/terminal-store.ts. Validation: targeted ESLint JSON run for the listed d17b files returned zero warnings and zero suppressedMessages; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; focused unit suite passed (22 files, 653 passed, 2 skipped); bun run build passed. Note: repo-wide bun run lint still reports 326 unrelated warnings outside the d17b file list, so this beat only resolves the targeted core-module warning surface.
